g.text: Medilink Hospital Management System - Entity Relationship Diagram
locationType : ENUM(PROVINCE, DISTRICT, SECTOR, CELL, VILLAGE) NOT NULL
• LocationType: PROVINCE, DISTRICT, SECTOR, CELL, VILLAGE
• Roles: ADMIN, DOCTOR, NURSE, RECEPTIONIST, PHARMACIST
• Central to appointment and medical record systems
: Location → Users/Doctors/Appointments, Patient → Appointments/MedicalRecords, Doctor → Appointments
: Users/Doctors/Appointments → Location, Appointments → Patient/Doctor, MedicalRecords → Patient
• Unique Constraints: username, nationalId, location code
• Indexes: Automatic on PKs and FKs for performance
One Patient has Many Medical Records
